title: Damind
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Damind.png|thumb|right|150px|Damind]]
'''Damind''' was a type of [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] used in the construction of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] used by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. The planet [[Daminia]] was the only known source of damind. In its mineral form, the crystal was known as '''damindium'''.

When set in a lightsaber's crystal chamber, damind created a wider and longer blade than seen on a standard lightsaber, able to more-easily deflect blaster fire.
